---
title: "Raborn Decision Sciences"
description: "Applied analytics and custom R/Shiny tools for measurement, operations, and planning."
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}
# Applied analytics and R-powered tools for better decisions

Raborn Decision Sciences helps individuals and organizations translate complex measurement, operational, and planning questions into defensible analyses, reproducible workflows, and usable decision-support tools.

[Explore services](services.qmd){.btn .btn-primary} [View tools](tools.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::

## What I do

:::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.rds-card}
### Assessment & Psychometrics

Item analysis, form analysis, DIF, equating, standard setting support, technical reporting, and validity evidence.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.rds-card}
### R/Shiny Decision Tools

Custom Shiny apps, Quarto reporting workflows, R package development, dashboards, and analytic automation.
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
::: {.rds-card}
### Operations & Planning Models

Break-even tools, capacity planning, pricing scenarios, and interactive models for direct-care and service-based practices.
:::
:::

::::

::: {.decision-point}
**Decision point:** The goal is not just analysis. The goal is a tool, workflow, or report that helps someone make a clearer decision.
:::


:::: {.grid .align-items-center}

::: {.g-col-12}
## Expert-led quantitative consulting

Raborn Decision Sciences is led by Anthony Raborn, a psychometrician/statistician focused on applied measurement, reproducible analytics, and custom R/Shiny decision tools.

[About Anthony](about.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::

::::
